svg.title: Problem Setup and Within-Subject Approach
svg.desc: Three-section figure: input tensor notation and 40-class classification objective; per-subject 7-fold leave-one-block-out cross-validation; and two encoder pipelines for compressed (DE/PSD) and raw EEG features.

g.text: 40-class concept prediction · encoder fθ + classifier gφ
7-Fold LOBO: rotate the test block across the 7 sessions
→ Final metrics: top-1 / top-5 averaged across 20 subjects × 7 folds = 140 trainings per condition

svg.text: ③ Two Encoder Pipelines (Compressed Features vs. Raw EEG)

g.text: X ∈ ℝ⁶² ˣ ⁵ (5 bands: δ θ α β γ)
